entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop subject to various fungal diseases affecting its fruits, seeds, and overall yield.

entities.name: FUNGAL DISEASES
entities.description: Diseases caused by fungi that affect groundnut, ranging from restricted to widespread distribution.

entities.name: FUNGI
entities.description: Organisms closely associated with groundnut fruits and seeds that cause fungal diseases.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographical region where most groundnut fungal diseases commonly occur.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The research institution conducting investigations on widespread groundnut diseases.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of groundnut which suffers economically important losses due to fungal diseases.

entities.name: FOLIAR DISEASES
entities.description: Fungal diseases that specifically affect the foliage of the groundnut plant.

entities.name: SOILBORNE DISEASES
entities.description: Fungal diseases that are transmitted through the soil to the groundnut plant.
